Training Name: Training 3 — IT Operations: Change, Configuration & Patch Management
Audience: IT / Service Desk; Developers; System/Data Owners
Learning Outcome: Identify the five CI classes under formal configuration control (CIA "High" systems, managed endpoints, cloud resources, production SaaS configs, critical documentation); determine whether a given component falls under configuration management

Training Name: Training 3 — IT Operations: Change, Configuration & Patch Management
Learning Outcome: Explain that configuration-as-code in Git is the authoritative baseline; Git history is the change history; Jira/Confluence links service asset records to repos and pipelines; know that when config cannot be managed as code, change tickets capture before/after state

Training Name: Training 3 — IT Operations: Change, Configuration & Patch Management
Audience: IT / Service Desk; Developers; System/Data Owners
Learning Outcome: Apply least functionality in baselines (remove non-essential services/components); include hardening guidance, identity/access parameters, logging, and monitoring hooks; know that baselines are reviewed at least annually

Training Name: Training 3 — IT Operations: Change, Configuration & Patch Management
Learning Outcome: Ensure peer review on pull/merge requests is mandatory for CIA "High" systems; run automated policy checks, tests, and scans in pipelines; trace every deployed change to an approved change record and CI record

Training Name: Training 3 — IT Operations: Change, Configuration & Patch Management
Audience: IT / Service Desk; Developers; System/Data Owners
Learning Outcome: Understand that automated drift detection generates tickets triaged within two business days; resolve drift by reconciling to baseline or raising a change request

Training Name: Training 3 — IT Operations: Change, Configuration & Patch Management
Learning Outcome: Retain CI inventories, baseline definitions, change histories, drift reports, and approvals as Controlled Records subject to the Document and Record Control Policy
